description_long: This is an ornate, tall vase with a flared, wavy rim and an intricately sculpted body. The vase features flowing, asymmetrical handles that curve gracefully from the neck to the lower body, creating an Art Nouveau-inspired silhouette. Decorative floral motifs and raised reliefs adorn the surface, adding texture and visual interest. The base is scalloped and sturdy, providing stability and a touch of elegance. The material appears to be a dark, matte ceramic or stone, giving the vase a substantial and refined appearance. Its overall design suggests it is intended as a decorative centerpiece for outdoor or semi-public urban spaces.
description: A tall, ornate vase with flowing handles, floral reliefs, and a wavy rim, crafted from dark ceramic or stone. Its sculpted details and elegant form make it a striking decorative piece.
description_view_0: Front view showing the prominent wavy rim, both curved handles, and detailed floral reliefs on the main body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the handles and the vase's elongated profile, with floral motifs partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite side's floral reliefs and the symmetry of the handles, with the base and rim clearly defined.
description_view_3: Alternate side view focusing on the curvature of the handles and the sculpted surface, with less floral detail visible.
